content.query:
CREATE OR ALTER PROCEDURE gold.refresh_gold_views
AS
BEGIN
    EXEC('
    CREATE OR ALTER VIEW gold.final AS
    SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
        BULK ''https://olistecommstorageaccount.dfs.core.windows.net/olist-ecomm-data/silver/'',
        FORMAT = ''PARQUET''
    ) AS result1
    ');

    EXEC('
    CREATE OR ALTER VIEW gold.delivered_orders AS
    SELECT * FROM gold.final WHERE order_status = ''delivered''
    ');

    EXEC('
    CREATE OR ALTER VIEW gold.category_sales AS
    SELECT product_category_name_english AS category,
           COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS total_orders,
           SUM(payment_value) AS total_revenue,
           AVG(payment_value) AS avg_order_value
    FROM gold.delivered_orders
    GROUP BY product_category_name_english
    ');

    EXEC('
    CREATE OR ALTER VIEW gold.monthly_sales AS
    SELECT DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(order_purchase_timestamp), MONTH(order_purchase_timestamp), 1) AS order_month,
           COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS total_orders,
           SUM(payment_value) AS total_revenue
    FROM gold.delivered_orders
    GROUP BY YEAR(order_purchase_timestamp), MONTH(order_purchase_timestamp)
    ');

    EXEC('
    CREATE OR ALTER VIEW gold.delivery_performance_by_state AS
    SELECT customer_state,
           COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS total_orders,
           AVG(delay) AS avg_delay_days,
           SUM(CASE WHEN delay > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_orders
    FROM gold.delivered_orders
    GROUP BY customer_state
    ');

    EXEC('
    CREATE OR ALTER VIEW gold.seller_performance AS
    SELECT seller_id, seller_state,
           COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS total_orders,
           SUM(payment_value) AS total_revenue,
           AVG(delay) AS avg_delay_days
    FROM gold.delivered_orders
    GROUP BY seller_id, seller_state
    ');
END
